creator: jake@stnlabs.com
text:
Rui Paulo asked for the output of wlandebug
+crypto+debug+assoc+auth+input+node+state+output+wpa+wme+inact:

Mar 14 23:02:56 babel kernel: wlan0: [00:17:fa:b9:5c:0f] recv probe req
Mar 14 23:02:56 babel kernel: wlan0: ieee80211_ref_node
(ieee80211_send_proberesp:2391) 0xc4795000<00:40:96:b8:13:53> refcnt 5
Mar 14 23:02:56 babel kernel: wlan0: send probe resp on channel 1 to
00:17:fa:b9:5c:0f
Mar 14 23:02:57 babel kernel: wlan0: [00:17:fa:b9:5c:0f] recv probe req
Mar 14 23:02:57 babel kernel: wlan0: ieee80211_ref_node
(ieee80211_send_proberesp:2391) 0xc4795000<00:40:96:b8:13:53> refcnt 5
Mar 14 23:02:57 babel kernel: wlan0: send probe resp on channel 1 to
00:17:fa:b9:5c:0f
Mar 14 23:03:03 babel kernel: wlan0: [00:00:85:f3:c9:85]
ieee80211_timeout_stations: inact 19 inact_reload 20 nrates 12

... repeated many times.
=20
